attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, 
CASE WHEN WI.PRODUCT_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WI.PRODUCT_KEY=-998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WI.PRODUCT_KEY=-997 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 ELSE WI.PRODUCT_KEY END PRODUCT_KEY , 
CASE WHEN WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY , 
WI.CHARGES_FLG, WI.CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG, 
WI.IC_REVENUE_FLG, WI.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG, WI.MISC_FLG, WI.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG, WI.SERVICE_FLG, WI.REVENUE_FLG, 
WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, WI.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, 
CASE WHEN WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END END_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
WI.EXTENDED_QTY, WI.EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY, WI.EXTENDED_NET_QTY, WI.COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, WI.COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT, 
WI.COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT, WI.COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT, WI.COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT, WI.COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT, 
WI.COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT, WI.COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT, WI.COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT, WI.DV_REV_STD_COST_ADJ_AMT, 
WI.DV_REV_ADJ_AMT, WI.DV_REV_ADJ_EXT_LST_AMT, WI.DV_DRCT_REV_ADJ_AMT, WI.DV_DRCT_REV_ST_CST_ADJ_AMT, 
WI.DV_INDRCT_REV_ADJ_AMT, WI.DV_INDRCT_RV_ST_CST_AD_AMT, WI.DV_STD_COST_AMT, WI.DV_ADJ_EXT_LIST_AMT, 
WI.DV_UNITS_WZFILT_NET_QTY, WI.DV_GROSS_UNITS_WZFILT_QTY, WI.DV_NET_UNITS_WZFILT_QTY, WI.DV_MKTSHR_UNITS_WZFILT_QTY ,
WI.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG,
WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
WI.CALENDAR_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT,
WI.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
WI.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
,WI.POB_TYPE_CD
,WI.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_INV_REV_PID_TER_POS_RF WI
